title: 24:06 ГўВЂВ” February 7, 2024
body_text:
24:06 ГўВЂВ” February 7, 2024
Update to the Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated the
Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
, to remove the Priority Delivery fee for ordering or selling foreign currency via FX Notes Plus. Priority delivery service is no longer available.
The Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only.
Document Library
Status
Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule
2725
Section 5.1, Currency Fees
We removed the FX Notes Plus priority delivery fee.
Revised
Section 6.2, Forge Small Business Maintenance Fees
We corrected the tier 3 ГўВЂВњActive UsersГўВЂВќ description. It now reads ГўВЂВњNext 10,000ГўВЂВќ rather than ГўВЂВњNext 20,000ГўВЂВќ.
Chapter 16, Cyber Security and Authentication Features
we corrected the ГўВЂВњSelf-Serve Reset PACГўВЂВќ product name as it was incorrectly described as ГўВЂВњSelf-Serve PAC ResetГўВЂВќ.
